description: Clean up the Thunderbird Address Book by segregating external vendors. Create a new address book named 'External Vendors' and move the contacts j.kaminski@yahoo.com, vkaminski@aol.com, and shirley.crenshaw@wcom.com from the 'Personal Address Book' into it. Ensure these contacts are moved and no longer appear in the 'Personal Address Book'. Do not modify or delete the internal @enron.com contacts. Close the Address Book window when finished to save changes.
